pfs.note: All Pathfinder Society agents also have access to all assistive items from Morhen’s Mobility Apparel

stat_block.text: A set of large blades have been attached to your chair's wheels. While in the chair, you gain a wheel blade Strike. Your wheel blade deals 1d4 slashing damage and has the agile, attached, and free-hand traits. A wheel blade is a simple melee weapon in the sword weapon group. You can etch weapon runes onto wheel blades. A wheelchair can only have one attached weapon.
